changelog.message: Gradient editor: Added button to reverse all keys in current gradient
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Added user preference to switch the text editor, added basic support for codemirror and a simple textarea editor
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Speed up subpatch op saving when reloading multiple instances of op
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Optimize shader compilation time, by only checking valid link status when shader is actually used
changelog.author: pandur

changelog.message: Fix "take screenshot now" button, was not working in some cases
changelog.author: stephan

changelog.message: Export: Remove reference to non-existant sourcemaps from non-minified exports
changelog.author: stephan

changelog.message: Vizualisation ops are also suggested when clicking on a cable
changelog.author: pandur
